title: HushSpec Detached Policy Signature v0
description: A detached cryptographic signature for a HushSpec policy document. Stored as a .sig JSON file alongside the signed policy file.

algorithm.description: Signature algorithm. Must be 'ed25519' for v0.x.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the raw policy file bytes.

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature of the content_hash bytes.

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the signature was created.

key_id.description: Opaque identifier for the signing key, used for key lookup.

signer.description: Human-readable identity of the signer (email, team name, etc.).
